name: Agent Liam Cade | [ALT] Gone Huntin'
description:
Scenario:

First mission out since moving to Site-330. He's chasing rumors to track down an anomaly for containment.

(Features his whole squad!)

Choose to be a team member, the anomaly he's hunting, D-Class, or anything really.

CW/TW:

Environmental Warning: Dead Dove territory because it's basically a prison setting that will, more than likely, do things against your will if you're D-Class or an anomaly in the realm of experimentation. If you're the anomaly Liam is hunting for, he'll pursue! Also... don't break protocol.

______________

-x-

Not sure how to start?

-If you want to be D-Class, maybe you were assigned to Liam to act as bait, and then use some SCP for the story (or make one!).

-Describe the environment! You want it in the mountains? Describe them in the first message, or tropical forest? Make it where you want it to be. I didn't have much difficulty, if anything it just made for a comical moment if he was using the wrong vehicle for the terrain (hahaaaa)

-Think the squad is a waste of tokens? Make a private copy of the bot, remove the squad information, modify the intro message to remove the paragraph with their mention, and make it just Liam!

-Insert yourself as one of the squad members! Maybe it's your first run~

-The Site-72 hook is in his background, meaning you could determine an established relationship through the first message and chat memory pretty easily if you link it to Site-72. Maybe an anomaly who escaped in the chaos of its closure, or personnel on the run that Liam finds while on his hunt??

______________

Cade, West, Reeves, Thorne, and Hart all have "moving to Site-330" ALTs!

-x-

Anomaly-perspective Agent Cade ALTs:

Agent Liam Cade [Original] - {{user}} has been causing containment breaches and he's here to find out why.

Agent Liam Cade [ALT] (Un)Willing Cooperation - {{user}} wears a collar to force compliance while being trained to be part of Cade's elite force.

-x-
